external_dependencies.name: mcp_server
external_dependencies.detail: The Kernel is exposed through the MCP Server, but MCP transport is not owned by this module.

external_dependencies.name: corpus_builder
external_dependencies.detail: Database, semantic release activation, rebuild, merge and search primitives remain Corpus Builder owner responsibilities.

external_dependencies.name: normalizer
external_dependencies.detail: Semantic release materialization, update-state application, projection validation and release candidate compilation remain Normalizer owner responsibilities.

external_dependencies.name: orchestrator
external_dependencies.detail: Pipeline run and runtime-owner interactions must use Orchestrator-owned contracts where applicable.

external_dependencies.name: client_frontend
external_dependencies.detail: User dialogs and Agent mirror events are rendered by the Client Frontend, not by this headless module.
